name: Equity Mutual Fund
description: Equity-focused mutual fund schemes offering various risk ratings, time horizons (short, medium, long term) and performance metrics (1Y, 3Y, 5Y, Since Inception).

name: Retail Domestic Term Deposits
description: Term deposit product for amounts up to Rs.3 crore with tenors from 7 days to 10 years. Interest rates range from 3.05% to 7.05% p.a. (senior citizens receive a premium).

name: Non-Callable Term Deposit - Retail
description: Non‑callable term deposit for balances between Rs.1,00,010 and Rs.3 crore. 1‑year tenor: 6.55% (public) / 7.05% (senior). 2‑year tenor: 6.80% (public) / 7.30% (senior). Rates are 0.30‑0.40% above the Card Rate.

name: SBI GREEN RUPEE TERM DEPOSIT
description: Eco‑friendly term deposit available for three specific tenors (1111, 1777 & 2222 days) at par with the prevailing Card Rate.

name: Recurring Deposit Scheme
description: Standard recurring deposit product allowing periodic contributions and earning interest similar to term deposits.

name: Tax Savings Scheme 2006
description: Fixed‑deposit style product offering tax benefits under Section 80C of the Indian Income Tax Act.

name: MODS
description: Multiple Option Deposit Scheme providing flexible interest options on fixed‑deposit balances.

name: Capgain Scheme
description: Deposit product designed for investors to park capital gains with competitive interest rates.

name: Amrit Vrishti
description: Special term deposit of 444 days; interest rate revised from 6.60% to 6.45% p.a. effective 15‑Dec‑2025.

name: SBI We‑care Deposit Scheme
description: Additional premium of 50 basis points added to the base rate for eligible deposits, enhancing overall returns.

name: SBI Regular Home Loan
description: Low interest home loans with flexible repayment options up to 30 years.

name: SBI Life - eShield Next
description: Comprehensive term life insurance protecting your family's future.

name: SBI General Health Insurance
description: Extensive health coverage for you and your family.
